endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Fetches a single Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes a single Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1beta1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates a single WorkflowConfig.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}/locations
endpoints.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:cancel
endpoints.description: Requests cancellation of a running WorkflowInvocation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:commit
endpoints.description: Applies a Git commit for uncommitted files in a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}:fetchFileGitStatuses
endpoints.description: Fetches Git statuses for the files in a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}:fetchGitAheadBehind
endpoints.description: Fetches Git ahead/behind against a remote branch.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}:fetchRemoteBranches
endpoints.description: Fetches a Repository's remote branches.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:pull
endpoints.description: Pulls Git commits from the Repository's remote into a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:push
endpoints.description: Pushes Git commits from a Workspace to the Repository's remote.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{name}:query
endpoints.description: Returns WorkflowInvocationActions in a given WorkflowInvocation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{name}:reset
endpoints.description: Performs a Git reset for uncommitted files in a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/compilationResults
endpoints.description: Lists CompilationResults in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/compilationResults
endpoints.description: Creates a new CompilationResult in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/releaseConfigs
endpoints.description: Lists ReleaseConfigs in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/releaseConfigs
endpoints.description: Creates a new ReleaseConfig in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/repositories
endpoints.description: Lists Repositories in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/repositories
endpoints.description: Creates a new Repository in a given project and location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/workflowConfigs
endpoints.description: Lists WorkflowConfigs in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/workflowConfigs
endpoints.description: Creates a new WorkflowConfig in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/workflowInvocations
endpoints.description: Lists WorkflowInvocations in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/workflowInvocations
endpoints.description: Creates a new WorkflowInvocation in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{parent}/workspaces
endpoints.description: Lists Workspaces in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{parent}/workspaces
endpoints.description: Creates a new Workspace in a given Repository.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{resource}:getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{resource}:setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{resource}:testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{workspace}:fetchFileDiff
endpoints.description: Fetches Git diff for an uncommitted file in a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:installNpmPackages
endpoints.description: Installs dependency NPM packages (inside a Workspace).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:makeDirectory
endpoints.description: Creates a directory inside a Workspace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:moveDirectory
endpoints.description: Moves a directory (inside a Workspace), and all of its contents, to a new location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:moveFile
endpoints.description: Moves a file (inside a Workspace) to a new location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{workspace}:queryDirectoryContents
endpoints.description: Returns the contents of a given Workspace directory.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: GET /v1beta1/{workspace}:readFile
endpoints.description: Returns the contents of a file (inside a Workspace).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:removeDirectory
endpoints.description: Deletes a directory (inside a Workspace) and all of its contents.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:removeFile
endpoints.description: Deletes a file (inside a Workspace).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.

endpoints.name: POST /v1beta1/{workspace}:writeFile
endpoints.description: Writes to a file (inside a Workspace).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{WORKSPACE}} with a real workspace.
